mapper.insert:
insert into question_bank ( course_id, type, content, answer, knowledge_point, difficulty_level, category_id, estimated_time_minutes, tags, is_ai_generated, generation_prompt, quality_score, created_by ) values
( #{item.courseId}, #{item.type}, #{item.content}, #{item.answer}, #{item.knowledgePoint}, #{item.difficultyLevel}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.estimatedTimeMinutes}, #{item.tags}, #{item.isAiGenerated}, #{item.generationPrompt}, #{item.qualityScore}, #{item.createdBy} )
